# NoteForAI

> AI-native persistent memory system. Give any AI a personal notebook that remembers across conversations and tools.

NoteForAI provides persistent memory for AI assistants via HTTP API and MCP (Model Context Protocol). One token gives Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor, Copilot, and any other AI tool cross-session memory with full data portability.

## Key Features

- **Persistent AI Memory**: Notes survive across conversations, sessions, and AI tool switches
- **HTTP + MCP Dual Protocol**: Standard HTTP API for any AI; native MCP Streamable HTTP for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf
- **Git Version Control**: Every note change is versioned; accidental deletions are recoverable
- **Full-text Search**: CJK-aware search across all notes
- **Data Portability**: Export all notes as Markdown, ZIP, or JSON at any time
- **Self-hostable**: Single Go binary, no external dependencies
- **No Registration**: Token-based, create instantly

## API Endpoints

All operations use `POST /{token}/{action}` with JSON body.

- `write` — Create or overwrite a note
- `read` — Read a note
- `append` — Append content to a note
- `delete` — Delete a note
- `search` — Full-text search across notes
- `tree` — List all notes
- `history` — View Git history for a note

## MCP Integration

Add to Claude Desktop or Claude Code:

```json
{
  "type": "http",
  "url": "https://noteforai.com/{token}/mcp"
}
```

## Comparison

| Feature | NoteForAI | Claude Memory | ChatGPT Memory |
|---------|-----------|---------------|----------------|
| Cross-platform | Yes | No (Claude only) | No (ChatGPT only) |
| Visible/editable | Yes | No (opaque) | Limited |
| Exportable | Yes | No | No |
| Self-hostable | Yes | No | No |
| Version history | Yes | No | No |

## Links

- Website: https://noteforai.com
- Dashboard: https://noteforai.com/dashboard.html
